name: Ernest Borel Holdings Limited
summary: Ernest Borel Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, markets, and sells Swiss-made mechanical and quartz premium watches for men and women under the Ernest Borel brand. The company sells its products in the People's Republic of China, Southeast Asia, the United States, and Europe. Ernest Borel Holdings Limited was founded in 1856 and is headquartered in Mongkok, Hong Kong. As of September 18, 2018, Ernest Borel Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of VGB Limiited.
